apps.name: Turboprop Flight Simulator
apps.subtitle: An awesome app.
apps.localizedDescription: This is an awesome app only available on AltStore.

versions.localizedDescription:
* Added the MS-26 special operations seaplane variant.
* Fixed some bugs.

* Added the 'Fulton Skyhook' for the HC/MC-130 aircraft.
* Added the 'Fulton Radome' for the HC/MC-130 aircraft.
* Added a new livery for the MV-40 aircraft.
* Fixed some bugs.

privacy.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: Used by the advert systems to deliver personalized ads.
privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Used for the delivery of ads relevant to the user's location.
